allegation: Harassment, contrary to section 2 of the Protection from Harassment Act 1997

cpsChase.label: Interview recording / transcript
cpsChase.draft: Please provide interview recording / transcript or confirm in writing why it is not available.

courtLine: The defence asks the court to record outstanding message/account source material and complainant statement gaps.
doNotOverstate: Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not state the defendant sent messages unless attribution is served and safe.
Do not state "interview confirms" — Interview material is not fully served
Do not state "witness statement is final" — Witness statement is draft or unsigned on papers
Do not state "MG11 is consistent and served" — Witness statement is draft or unsigned on papers
